title: Journey to Eggmanland
overview: Sonic and Tails travel to Dr. Robotnik's utopian city of Robotropolis to stop the Robot Generator and defeat Metal Robotnik, who has banished Robotnik from his city.

title: Sonic vs. Metal Sonic!!
overview: The second episode centers around the conflict between Sonic and Hyper Metal Sonic, Robotnik's greatest creation yet.
